name: management-ui
description: Web interface for managing services, DNS, projects, and infrastructure

scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently -n back,front -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build -w shared && npm run dev -w backend
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w shared && tsc --noEmit -p backend && tsc --noEmit -p frontend
